summary: The protagonist, Garon, teleports to the Ancient Dungeon to undertake a series of challenges set within the Beginner Academy of the Luds Empire. He must navigate through ten stages, beginning with a written examination that tests his knowledge of the empire's history and politics. Despite the stressful environment, Garon successfully answers the questions, eventually encountering an unexpected appearance from his master.
key_moments: Garon uses a teleportation scroll to enter the Ancient Dungeon.
Garon enters the Luds Empire Beginner Academy and begins a thirty-minute written exam.
Garon completes the exam and is surprised by the sudden arrival of his master.
